title: All project rooms, experiments, and case studies.
description: A fuller archive of product systems, dashboards, mobile concepts, UI explorations, client work, and future ideas shaped by fullstack development and design thinking.

items.title: TrackOrderFlow
items.shortDescription: A cross-division workflow platform for operational visibility, invoices, finance, queues, roles, notifications, and dashboards.
items.longDescription: TrackOrderFlow is designed as a serious internal workflow management platform for teams that need clarity across sales, relationship managers, production, finance, digital marketing, project managers, and administrators.
items.role: Fullstack developer, workflow planner, UI system designer
features: Invoice, finance, queue, and notification workflows
Scalable module boundaries for future growth
challenges: Keeping workflows readable across many roles
Designing data boundaries that remain maintainable
Balancing operational density with clean UI

items.title: Lokanata OJS Theme
items.shortDescription: A more editorial and maintainable OJS 3.x theme direction for institutional scientific journals.
items.longDescription: Lokanata OJS Theme focuses on turning a technical journal platform into a cleaner publishing experience with custom visual hierarchy, workflow awareness, and reusable content blocks.
items.role: OJS theme customizer, CSS system builder, technical support
challenges: Keeping academic credibility while improving visuals

items.title: Flowty Pay POS
items.shortDescription: A Laravel POS with barcode checkout, stock opname, CRM foundations, and inventory migration support.
items.longDescription: Flowty Pay POS is a retail operations toolkit focused on faster checkout, cleaner inventory control, practical CRM foundations, and accurate data migration for small businesses.
items.role: Laravel developer, IT support, migration handler
challenges: Making internal workflows simple for daily use

items.title: Creative Developer Lab
items.shortDescription: An experimental space for React motion, design systems, analytics, and automation ideas.
items.longDescription: Creative Developer Lab is a personal product lab for exploring motion-first interfaces, design systems, automation flows, dashboards, and ideas that make software feel more human.
items.role: Creative developer, motion designer, product explorer

items.title: Midtrans POS Payment Module
items.shortDescription: A payment gateway module for POS workflows with Laravel backend and structured database planning.
items.longDescription: This module focuses on secure and practical payment handling inside a POS ecosystem, supported by database planning, transaction flow mapping, and backend integration.
challenges: Coordinating delivery with a small team

items.title: Infrasch Mobile Concept
items.shortDescription: A mobile collaboration concept with clean task cards, project updates, and lightweight team interaction patterns.
items.longDescription: Infrasch explores a modern mobile app interface for project collaboration, built around lightweight navigation, clear content cards, and friendly visual hierarchy.
challenges: Making mobile screens feel dense but calm

items.title: Personal Memory Portfolio
items.shortDescription: A storytelling portfolio that combines editorial layout, GSAP motion, bilingual content, and personal career narrative.
items.longDescription: This portfolio is built as a personal digital memory space where experience, skills, project direction, and future vision are presented with a premium editorial interface.
items.role: Frontend developer, visual designer, content architect
challenges: Balancing personal tone and professional polish

items.title: WordPress Client Builder
items.shortDescription: Company profile and news-style WordPress builds using theme customization and page builder workflows.
items.longDescription: A client-facing website delivery workflow focused on fast iteration, design alignment, theme customization, and practical support after deployment.
